result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 21:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS current_ownerid,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         ch.cnt AS owner_assignments,
         ch.newvalue__c AS first_ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN ch ON ch.case_id = c.id AND ch.rn = 1
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), per_case_handle AS (
  -- only cases NOT transferred (exactly one owner assignment)
  SELECT
    case_id,
    first_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
  WHERE owner_assignments = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- counts for managed/handled filter apply to both initial assignment and transfers
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, first_ownerid AS agent_id FROM eligible_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, current_ownerid AS agent_id FROM eligible_cases
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_avg AS (
  SELECT p.agent_id, AVG(p.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM per_case_handle p
  GROUP BY p.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_avg a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS current_ownerid,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         ch.cnt AS owner_assignments,
         ch.newvalue__c AS first_ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN ch ON ch.case_id = c.id AND ch.rn = 1
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), per_case_handle AS (
  -- only cases NOT transferred (exactly one owner assignment)
  SELECT
    case_id,
    first_ownerid AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
  WHERE owner_assignments = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- counts for managed/handled filter apply to both initial assignment and transfers
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, first_ownerid AS agent_id FROM eligible_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, current_ownerid AS agent_id FROM eligible_cases
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_avg AS (
  SELECT p.agent_id, AVG(p.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM per_case_handle p
  GROUP BY p.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_avg a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    newvalue__c,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS current_ownerid,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         ch.cnt AS owner_assignments,
         ch.newvalue__c AS first_ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN ch ON ch.case_id = c.id AND ch.rn = 1
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT owner_assignments, COUNT(*) AS n_cases
FROM eligible_cases
GROUP BY owner_assignments
ORDER BY owner_assignments;

args.query:
WITH c AS (
  SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM c
WHERE created_ts >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months');

exec_args.sql:
WITH c AS (
  SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM c
WHERE created_ts >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months');

args.query:
WITH eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid AS agent_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), per_case AS (
  SELECT case_id, agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM per_case
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_avg AS (
  SELECT agent_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM per_case
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_avg a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
